faa.license: United States government work; unrestricted public use

label: KBDU-inspired / not for navigation
limitations: Reference geometry is simplified, clipped, and quantized for a standalone Quest prototype.
OSM completeness and tag accuracy vary; this asset is not an aeronautical database.
Building heights are used only when explicitly tagged; untagged buildings need conservative runtime defaults.
NAIP availability was proven, but imagery was not committed because a seam-safe tiled/ASTC path is not yet validated.

macro_material_fallback.assignment: deterministic project-authored palette assigned from OSM landuse, natural, highway, aeroway, and surface tags

imagery_gate.decision: Do not commit NAIP imagery in this pass; use deterministic OSM macro land-cover/material regions.
imagery_gate.exact_blocker: A useful 24 km x 24 km 1 m macro source would be about 24,000 x 24,000 pixels before tiling, while this service advertises 4000 x 4000 maximum exports. The project lacks a proven seam-safe tiling, color-normalization, mip, and Android ASTC import path; a single downsampled image would either exceed the 750 KB committed macro-texture budget or blur airport/field detail.

macro_material_fallback.license: Project-authored deterministic colors/parameters; no downloaded textures.
